headline: Is Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is EXR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Extra Space Storage Inc. on Compounding Dividends’s Substack by TJ Terwilliger. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on EXR. Extra Space Storage Inc.’s share was trading at $128.96 as of March 27th. EXR’s trailing and forward P/E were 28.38 and 26.39 respectively according to […]

headline: Does Baron Capital’s Renewed Bet On EXR Signal A Turning Point In Its Growth Narrative?
summary: In recent months, Baron Capital used its quarterly investor letter to highlight Extra Space Storage as a best-in-class self-storage REIT and disclosed that it had reacquired shares, citing an anticipated improvement in fundamentals from 2026 as demand and rents stabilize and new supply moderates. The asset manager also emphasized Extra Space Storage’s focus on accretive capital allocation, including acquisitions and bridge lending, which it believes could position the company to benefit as...
